title: Traditional Fudge Candy - Vanilla Ice Cream - Mr Fudgesto Sweets - 250g Caramels Box - Gourmet Treat Perfect for Gifting
features: 🍬 UNFORGETTABLE TASTE - Indulge in the rich, buttery taste of our hand-made fudge, infused with the traditional and addictive flavors
🍬 CRUNCHY OR CHEWY - Depending on the flavor, we deliver either incredibly crunchy or wonderfully chewy candies. It's a pure surprise which type of candy you'll get!

🍬 EXPLORE A WORLD OF FLAVORS - With 22 different flavor options to choose from, you can explore a world of flavors and find your favorite, or even discover a new one. And for a truly special treat, try our exclusive proprietary blends that you can't find anywhere else

🍬 THE PERFECT GIFT - Not only is our fudge delicious, but it also makes the perfect gift for any occasion. From birthdays to Christmas, Mother's Day to Valentine's Day or even as office sweets or present for your client, our fudge in a variety of flavors is sure to delight men and women of all ages

🍬 ALL-NATURAL INGREDIENTS - At Mr Fudgesto, we believe in using only the highest quality, all-natural ingredients in our fudge. You won't find any artificial colors or preservatives in our recipe, just pure, wholesome goodness in every bite
🍬 SIMPLE FORMULA: sugar, glucose syrup, whole milk powder, 82% butter from milk, vanila flavor
description: From the brand Previous page At Mr Fudgesto, we continue a several decades-long tradition of handmade production of toffees. Our treats are made according to an old recipe, using only natural ingredients. You won't find any artificial colors or preservatives in our toffees. They're perfect as a gift for both children and adults who appreciate taste and quality. Try our toffees and feel the difference. Hand-packed Toffees Our toffees are true works of art. Each one is hand-packed and enclosed in an elegant box. Many Flavours Perfect for any occasion! Add a touch of sweetness... Special gift for loved ones! Choose from 250g and 900g pack Next page
